claims.claim: Telemetry and sensory lanes are core contact architecture because they bind Astrid's symbolic bridge to Minime's spectral substrate.
PRESSURE_POROSITY_EXPANSION_VISCOUS_DENSITY_WARNING_AT=0.28 may be too sensitive under high entropy and settled habitable states, so threshold changes need replay and operator approval.
Pressure smoothing may hide a persistent 'bruise' baseline deformation by treating it as noisy fluctuation.
A 90-second high-entropy reflective stale-window reciprocity trace should remain available as evidence before any live stale-window retune.
Pressure trend smoothing could eventually incorporate density-gradient or viscosity persistence, but live smoothing/control changes require explicit authority.
